description_long: This is a modern chandelier with a minimalist, industrial design, featuring a central circular ceiling mount from which eight slender, curved metal arms extend outward. Each arm is suspended by a thin cable and terminates in a small, cylindrical lamp holder, likely designed to accommodate compact bulbs. The arms are evenly spaced, creating a symmetrical, spider-like appearance that is both functional and decorative. The overall structure is lightweight and airy, with exposed wiring and metallic finishes contributing to its contemporary aesthetic. The lamp is intended to be ceiling-mounted, making it suitable for urban interiors such as lofts, cafes, or modern communal spaces. Its design emphasizes both illumination and visual interest, serving as a focal point in any room.
description: A modern, minimalist chandelier with eight curved metal arms and exposed cylindrical lamp holders, suspended from a central ceiling mount. Its sleek, industrial design makes it a striking ceiling fixture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of eight curved arms radiating from the central mount, with all lamp holders clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth and curvature of the arms, with the cables and lamp holders appearing more staggered.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the even spacing of the arms and the uniformity of the lamp holders around the central mount.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the elegant arc of the arms and the suspended lamp holders.
